decisions.briefing: Markets are mildly positive today with NASDAQ up 0.6% and S&P 500 up 0.5%, providing a calm backdrop for deploying idle cash. I'm adding three score-95 names — PLTR, QBTS, and BRAI — all sitting in the ideal RSI 55–70 momentum zone with full MACD confirmation, taking us from 6 to 9 positions. This brings cash below the $500 hold threshold while staying within the 10-position cap.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted modestly higher on May 28 as cooling inflation expectations reduced pressure on the Fed to act aggressively, with tech leading gains on continued AI infrastructure spending optimism. Defensive and consumer-discretionary names also edged up as consumer sentiment data came in above forecasts, signalling resilient household spending. The broad advance across sectors kept volatility low, reinforcing a neutral-to-constructive tone heading into the final days of May.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於5月28日溫和上漲，通脹預期降溫令市場對聯儲局進取加息的憂慮有所緩解，科技板塊在人工智能基礎設施投資持續樂觀情緒帶動下領漲。消費者信心數據優於預期，亦支撐了非必需消費品類股走高，顯示家庭消費仍具韌性。各板塊普遍溫和上揚，市場波動性維持低位，月底前整體氣氛趨於中性偏積極。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already moving upward on the theory that strong price trends tend to continue in the short term. Traders use indicators like RSI (Relative Strength Index) and MACD to confirm that a stock is in a healthy 'momentum zone' — strong enough to keep rising but not so overbought it's due for a pullback. Today every new buy sits in the RSI 55–70 sweet spot, the textbook momentum window.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是指買入已在上升趨勢中的股票，其邏輯在於強勁的價格走勢往往會在短期內持續。交易者常用相對強弱指數（RSI）及MACD等技術指標，確認股票處於健康的「動量區間」——漲勢足夠強勁，但尚未進入超買區域。今日三筆買入的RSI均落在55至70的理想區間，正是教科書式的動量進場窗口。
